auth.label: API Token
auth.description: IPinfo access token used to authenticate API requests. Get it from the IPinfo dashboard: https://ipinfo.io/dashboard/lite.

actions.name: batch_lite_lookup
actions.description: Look up multiple Lite API IPs or field paths in a single batch request.

items.description: An IP address or field path item for the Lite batch endpoint.

queries.description: The Lite API queries to send to the batch lookup endpoint.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Lite batch lookup endpoint.

outputSchema.description: A map from each Lite batch query string to the corresponding IPinfo result.

actions.name: batch_lookup
actions.description: Look up multiple IPinfo legacy or Lite-compatible paths in a single batch request through the legacy batch endpoint.

items.description: An IP address or batch lookup path item.

ips.description: The IP addresses or field paths to send to the batch lookup endpoint.

filter.description: Whether null results should be omitted from the returned map.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the legacy batch lookup endpoint.

outputSchema.description: A map from each batch query string to the corresponding IPinfo batch result.

actions.name: get_abuse_contact
actions.description: Retrieve abuse contact data for a specific IP address when the token includes that dataset.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

address.description: The postal address of the abuse contact.

country.description: The country code of the abuse contact.

network.description: The network range in CIDR notation.

abuse.description: Abuse contact data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

outputSchema.description: The abuse contact payload for the requested IP address.

actions.name: get_carrier_info
actions.description: Retrieve carrier enrichment data for a specific IP address when the token includes that dataset.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

name.description: The mobile carrier or network organization name.

carrier.description: Carrier data returned by IPinfo for mobile network IP addresses.

outputSchema.description: The carrier enrichment payload for the requested IP address.

actions.name: get_city_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the city name for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

city.description: The city name returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_company_info
actions.description: Retrieve company enrichment data for a specific IP address when the token includes that dataset.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

domain.description: The primary domain associated with the company.

type.description: The organization type, such as business, ISP, education, or hosting.

outputSchema.description: Company data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to business enrichment.

actions.name: get_core_field_by_me
actions.description: Retrieve a single Lookup API core field for the caller's current IP address.

field.description: The Lookup API field path to retrieve for the caller's current IP.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a specific Lookup API core field.

outputSchema.description: The returned value for a specific IPinfo field lookup.

actions.name: get_country_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

country_code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_current_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the caller's current public IP address as plain text.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

ip.description: The caller's current public IP address.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_current_ip_info
actions.description: Retrieve the full legacy IPinfo profile for the caller's current IP address, including location, ASN, company, privacy, carrier, abuse, and hosted domain data when available.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

ip.description: The IP address that was looked up.

hostname.description: The reverse DNS hostname when available.

bogon.description: Whether the IP address is a bogon or private address.

anycast.description: Whether the IP address is identified as anycast.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code returned by the legacy API.

loc.description: The latitude and longitude pair in latitude,longitude format.

org.description: The organization summary returned by the legacy API.

route.description: The route associated with the IP-specific ASN summary.

type.description: The autonomous system organization type, such as ISP, hosting, or business.

country.description: The country code registered for the autonomous system.

allocated.description: The allocation date for the autonomous system.

registry.description: The regional internet registry for the autonomous system.

num_ips.description: The number of IP addresses announced by the autonomous system.

items.description: Additional object fields returned by IPinfo.

prefixes.description: A list of objects returned by IPinfo.

items.description: Additional object fields returned by IPinfo.

prefixes6.description: A list of objects returned by IPinfo.

asn.description: ASN data returned by IPinfo, enriched with the standalone ASN endpoint when available.

domain.description: The primary domain associated with the company.

type.description: The organization type, such as business, ISP, education, or hosting.

company.description: Company data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to business enrichment.

name.description: The mobile carrier or network organization name.

carrier.description: Carrier data returned by IPinfo for mobile network IP addresses.

vpn.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a VPN exit node.

proxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

tor.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a Tor exit node.

relay.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a relay service such as iCloud Private Relay.

hosting.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a hosting or datacenter network.

service.description: The detected privacy service provider name.

privacy.description: Privacy detection data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

address.description: The postal address of the abuse contact.

country.description: The country code of the abuse contact.

network.description: The network range in CIDR notation.

abuse.description: Abuse contact data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

ip.description: The IP address used for the hosted domains lookup.

total.description: The total number of hosted domains returned by IPinfo.

domains.description: A sample of hosted domains associated with the IP address.
Hosted domain data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

outputSchema.description: The full legacy IPinfo response, enriched with standalone ASN details when the response includes an ASN.

actions.name: get_current_loc
actions.description: Retrieve the caller's current coordinates in latitude,longitude format.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

location.description: The coordinates returned by IPinfo in latitude,longitude format.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_current_region
actions.description: Retrieve the caller's current region or state name.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

region.description: The current region or state name.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_geo_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve Lookup API geolocation data for a specific IP address, including city, region, country, coordinates, timezone, and postal metadata.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

radius.description: The estimated location radius in kilometers.

last_changed.description: The date when the geolocation data last changed.

outputSchema.description: Geolocation data returned by the IPinfo Lookup API.

actions.name: get_hostname_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the reverse DNS hostname for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

hostname.description: The reverse DNS hostname returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_ip_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the requested IP address as plain text through the field filtering endpoint.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

ip.description: The requested IP address as returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_ip_info
actions.description: Retrieve Lite IP information for a specific IP address or for the caller's current IP when no IP is provided.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up. Omit this field to use the caller's current IP.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving lite IP information.

ip.description: The IP address that was looked up.

bogon.description: Whether the IP address is a bogon or private address.

hostname.description: The reverse DNS hostname when available.

outputSchema.description: Lite IP data returned by IPinfo with an optional hostname enrichment.

actions.name: get_ip_info_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the full legacy IPinfo profile for a specific IP address, including location, ASN, company, privacy, carrier, abuse, and hosted domain data when available.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

ip.description: The IP address that was looked up.

hostname.description: The reverse DNS hostname when available.

bogon.description: Whether the IP address is a bogon or private address.

anycast.description: Whether the IP address is identified as anycast.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code returned by the legacy API.

loc.description: The latitude and longitude pair in latitude,longitude format.

org.description: The organization summary returned by the legacy API.

route.description: The route associated with the IP-specific ASN summary.

type.description: The autonomous system organization type, such as ISP, hosting, or business.

country.description: The country code registered for the autonomous system.

allocated.description: The allocation date for the autonomous system.

registry.description: The regional internet registry for the autonomous system.

num_ips.description: The number of IP addresses announced by the autonomous system.

items.description: Additional object fields returned by IPinfo.

prefixes.description: A list of objects returned by IPinfo.

items.description: Additional object fields returned by IPinfo.

prefixes6.description: A list of objects returned by IPinfo.

asn.description: ASN data returned by IPinfo, enriched with the standalone ASN endpoint when available.

domain.description: The primary domain associated with the company.

type.description: The organization type, such as business, ISP, education, or hosting.

company.description: Company data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to business enrichment.

name.description: The mobile carrier or network organization name.

carrier.description: Carrier data returned by IPinfo for mobile network IP addresses.

vpn.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a VPN exit node.

proxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

tor.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a Tor exit node.

relay.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a relay service such as iCloud Private Relay.

hosting.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a hosting or datacenter network.

service.description: The detected privacy service provider name.

privacy.description: Privacy detection data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

address.description: The postal address of the abuse contact.

country.description: The country code of the abuse contact.

network.description: The network range in CIDR notation.

abuse.description: Abuse contact data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

ip.description: The IP address used for the hosted domains lookup.

total.description: The total number of hosted domains returned by IPinfo.

domains.description: A sample of hosted domains associated with the IP address.
Hosted domain data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

outputSchema.description: The full legacy IPinfo response, enriched with standalone ASN details when the response includes an ASN.

actions.name: get_lite_field_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve a single field from the Lite API for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

field.description: The Lite API field path to retrieve for the requested IP address.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a specific Lite API field.

outputSchema.description: The returned value for a specific IPinfo field lookup.

actions.name: get_location_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve coordinates for a specific IP address in latitude,longitude format.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

location.description: The coordinates returned by IPinfo in latitude,longitude format.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_org_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the organization summary for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

org.description: The organization summary returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_plus_field_by_me
actions.description: Retrieve a single Lookup API plus field for the caller's current IP address.

field.description: The Lookup API field path to retrieve for the caller's current IP.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a specific Lookup API plus field.

outputSchema.description: The returned value for a specific IPinfo field lookup.

actions.name: get_postal_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the postal or ZIP code for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

postal.description: The postal or ZIP code returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_privacy_details
actions.description: Retrieve privacy detection flags for a specific IP address when the token includes privacy enrichment.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

vpn.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a VPN exit node.

proxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

tor.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a Tor exit node.

relay.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a relay service such as iCloud Private Relay.

hosting.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a hosting or datacenter network.

service.description: The detected privacy service provider name.

outputSchema.description: Privacy detection data returned by IPinfo when the token has access to it.

actions.name: get_region_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the region or state name for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

region.description: The region or state name returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_timezone_by_ip
actions.description: Retrieve the IANA timezone name for a specific IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone name returned by IPinfo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_token_info
actions.description: Retrieve account and usage metadata for the current IPinfo token.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

token.description: The token echoed by the token information endpoint.

name.description: The account or token label when available.

day.description: The number of requests used today.

month.description: The number of requests used this month.

limit.description: The request limit associated with the token.

requests.description: Usage counters returned for the IPinfo token.

features.description: The feature access map returned for the token.

outputSchema.description: Account and usage metadata returned for the current IPinfo token.

actions.name: map_ips
actions.description: Upload up to 500,000 IP addresses to the IPinfo map tool and return the generated report URL.

items.description: An IP address to include in the map upload.

ipAddresses.description: The IP addresses to upload to the IPinfo map tool.

cli.description: The optional CLI mode flag accepted by the IPinfo map tool.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an IPinfo map report.

status.description: The status returned by the IPinfo map endpoint.

reportUrl.description: The generated IPinfo map report URL.

outputSchema.description: The generated map report metadata returned by IPinfo.
